rows.label: tev030791_MSG0001
rows.name:
I feel like I'm on cloud nine today, you know?
See, I was having this lousy streak where I was
getting nothing but bronze cards? But then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0002
rows.name:
But then this Larsian customer came along and
bought these med kits I made called Ultra
Regenerators. And I mean she bought a TON, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0003
rows.name:
Do you want to know my very first thought
after that? I thought about buying a a
wheelbarrow full of rare Miralife Cards![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0004
rows.name: That client was an angel, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0005
rows.name:
She said she made all her money
from white gold she lifted off some
unsavory types or...something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0006
rows.name:
I didn't ask why she needed all the med
kits, though. I guess it's a mystery?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0007
rows.name:
Anyway, I told her how I was going
to use her money to buy every last
Miralife Card in Mira, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0008
rows.name:
So she asked, "Are those popular among the whelps
of NLA?" And I said, "You don't have to be a
whelp to appreciate these, I don't think?"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0009
rows.name:
Anyway, as she walked off, I
heard her mumbling that she
might buy some "for the kids"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0010
rows.name: I wonder who she was? Anyone you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_JNK0010
rows.name: Guess

rows.label: tev030791_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Zullaniky that it was Ga Bewhe, the Larsian Robin Hood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_JNK0020
rows.name: Joke

rows.label: tev030791_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Zullaniky that it was Ga Bewhe, the Empress of Card Collectors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0011
rows.name:
Oh, so she's a good guy then?
Maybe she bought the med kits to
help sick kids or something...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0012
rows.name:
In that case, I hope the card packs she
picked up as souvenirs were packed with
tons of rare Miralife Cards, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0013
rows.name:
That ought to put some smiles
on their faces, I would think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0014
rows.name:
My day just got even better. It
always feels great to do business
with a good person, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0015
rows.name:
So she goes around stealing from bad
guys just so she can buy cards? Wow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0016
rows.name:
I respect that, you know? She's a true
Miralife collector through and through![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0017
rows.name:
If I ever bump into her again, I'll have
to hit her up for some trades, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030791_MSG0018
rows.name:
My day just got even better. It always
feels great to do business with a
fellow fanatic, don't you think?[ST:wait ]
